name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #24
description: Florentine Brainrot #24 is a blue screen reliquary single-panel relic built around Botticelli and Printer-Jam Illuminated Manuscript. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Acqua, used here as the witness card. The Printer-Jam Illuminated Manuscript layout makes the old scandal look newly clickable. The small evidence marks become witnesses, not gimmicks. Serial BOTT-24 carries codon marker GATTAAACTACCATATGTGAACTCCTAATT; Gematria marks OHIO at Σ 282.

attributes.value: a floor-price crown made of unsold listing cards
